context: A young woman drives a sleek sports car along a picturesque mountain road.

actions.description: The camera frames the driver, fastened seatbelt, modern dashboard, and curving road ahead.
She steers through a gentle bend while trees slide past the windows and the touchscreen glows.
The road opens toward distant mountains as the car continues smoothly forward.
